install_steps: npm install -g @rslint/cli  # or download binary from GitHub Releases
note: rslint is built with Go and typescript-go, delivering 20-40x faster linting than traditional ESLint setups. It ships with all TypeScript-ESLint and widely-used ESLint rules out of the box. Download pre-built binaries from https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rslint/releases. See the guide at https://rslint.rs/guide/ for detailed setup.
